pilot_config.samples_note: All pilots use the full dataset (50k CIFAR, 1.28M ImageNet) — subsampling would invalidate the signal since per-epoch timing is the primary metric

pilots.purpose: Verify NoBN ResNet-20 training stability before committing 9 runs x 200 epochs

new_code_required.description: Add resnet20_nobn to models.py — replace all nn.BatchNorm2d with nn.Identity in BasicBlock and ResNet
new_code_required.change: Add resnet20_nobn factory function; BasicBlockNoBN with Identity instead of BN

pass_criteria.stability: All 3 methods complete 5 epochs without loss > 5.0 or NaN
pass_criteria.timing: Note per-epoch time for constant and cwd_hard to plan wave1 dispatch
pass_criteria.no_oom: Confirm no GPU OOM errors on single GPU

pilots.purpose: Check rho=5.0 stability before 12 runs x 200 epochs; measure effective rho

pass_criteria.rho_high_stable_or_fallback: wd=5e-3 run either converges OR triggers documented fallback to wd=2e-3
pass_criteria.rho_measurement: Measured rho_per_layer mean at epoch 1: rho_low in [0.01, 0.2], rho_high in [1.0, 20.0] or fallback in [0.5, 5.0]

pilots.fallback_logic: If wd=5e-3 diverges (loss > 5.0 within 5 epochs), switch to wd=2e-3 for full experiments and update full_rho_high_cifar10 task accordingly

pilots.purpose: Validate ImageNet data loading, ResNet-50 DataParallel, bf16, per-layer diagnostics — infrastructure only

new_code_required.description: New training script for ImageNet/ResNet-50 with bf16, DataParallel, per-layer diagnostics

files.name: exp/code/train_imagenet.py
files.purpose: Main training script adapted from train_unified.py, adds: bf16 autocast, torchvision ResNet-50, ImageNet loader, per-layer rho heatmap logging

files.name: exp/code/data_imagenet.py
files.purpose: ImageNet DataLoader with standard augmentation (RandomResizedCrop 224, RandomHorizontalFlip, Normalize ImageNet mean/std)

pass_criteria.data_loads: ImageNet train/val dataloaders initialize without error
pass_criteria.trains_1_epoch: 1 epoch completes within 30 min on 2 GPUs
pass_criteria.no_oom: No GPU OOM error on 2x RTX PRO 6000 with batch=512 (256 per GPU)
pass_criteria.diagnostics_valid: Summary JSON contains: top1_acc (non-NaN), per_layer_rho (list of L values where L = num params), alignment_cosine_mean, CSI, AIS, BEM

imagenet_availability_check.note: If ImageNet not at data/imagenet/, the pilot script should: (1) check /datasets/imagenet/, /data/imagenet/, ~/data/imagenet/; (2) if not found, download via torchvision with download=True (requires ~150 GB); (3) log data path in summary.json
imagenet_availability_check.fallback_subset: If download fails or takes too long, use a 1-class subset (1000 images) for smoke test only — flag output as SMOKE_TEST_ONLY in summary.json

pilot_execution_order.parallelism: Run both on separate GPUs simultaneously
pilot_execution_order.action_on_pass: Immediately launch full_nobn_cifar10 (9 runs), full_rho_low_cifar10 (12 runs), full_rho_high_cifar10 (12 runs) in parallel
pilot_execution_order.action_on_fail: Diagnose, fix code (e.g. reduce lr, increase clipping), re-run pilot before launching full

pilot_execution_order.parallelism: Can run after step 1 passes, uses 2 GPUs
pilot_execution_order.action_on_pass: Launch full_imagenet_resnet50_seed42 (4 runs x 2 GPUs = 8 GPUs, or 2 at a time)
pilot_execution_order.action_on_fail: Debug ImageNet data loading or DataParallel setup; most likely issue is data path or memory
